commit_scope: Make the Android Coherence Sense app count the local Mac witness as a visible peer/channel and make the Mac witness dashboard show live Form-kernel recognition plus audio, video, GPU, screen, and channel receipts.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in dirty continuation mode with no blocking risk. ADB showed SM-S918U1 device R5CW20DK17A. Duplicate 18800 witness advertising was stopped for this session so Android discovers one Mac witness at http://192.168.0.7:8800. The Mac witness launchd service is running at http://127.0.0.1:8800 and advertises _hati-witness._tcp mode recognition. The local Form kernel release binary was built successfully. Final witness state after restart: present=true, sample_frames=12, heartbeat_frames=4, kernel_ok=true, recognized=still, predicted=still, checks=11, errors=0, challenger=still, chal_checks=13, protos=14. Latest live receipt included mic_rms=0.002248507300374206, camera_luma=0.0035968527538403896, camera_samples=8522, gpu_samples=353, channels_offered=[wifi,screen,ble,audio,video], and organs_active=[accelerometer,camera,gps,gpu,gyroscope,light,magnetometer,mic,network,screen]. Android screenshot shows state 'local Mac witness connected; public mesh quiet', present peers 1, connected channels 1, offered 5, best shared carrier wifi:mac-witness. Android channels screenshot shows 10 organs, mic granted/rms, camera granted/luma, screen QR/write active, Bluetooth enabled, and body peers 1.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; CI not run.

deploy_validation.summary: The Mac LaunchAgent and the real Android phone were updated and verified locally. Public APK/release publishing is not part of this slice.

phase_gate.gate: Android must show the local Mac witness as an actual peer/channel when public mesh is quiet, and the Mac app must show the live Form-kernel recognition stream with audio/video/GPU/screen receipts.
phase_gate.next: Push the branch, run CI, and publish/install the signed Android artifact when release scope is opened.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Android app no longer reports zero peers/channels when it is connected to the local Mac witness. The Mac app at http://127.0.0.1:8800 shows the live phone stream, Form-kernel recognition and learning counters, and visible audio, video, GPU, screen, channel, and active-organ receipts.
test_flows: Run one Mac witness service at 8800 and verify mDNS descriptor plus /state.
Open Android app on the real phone, let it auto-discover http://192.168.0.7:8800, and verify the visible Mesh panel reports local witness peer/channel instead of zero.
Capture Android channel lanes proving mic, camera, screen, Bluetooth, body peers, and sensor organs are visible.
Open the Mac dashboard in the in-app browser and verify kernel recognition, prediction, challenger agreement, sample/heartbeat counts, and latest field receipts.
e2e_validation.summary: Local end-to-end Mac plus Android witness visibility passed with real phone samples and a local Form-kernel recognition witness.
